scripts.postversion: git add -A && git commit -m "chore: bump version to $(node -e "console.log(require('./package.json').version)")" && git tag v$(node -e "console.log(require('./package.json').version)")
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch --message 'chore: bump version to %s'
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --message 'chore: bump version to %s'
scripts.release:major: npm version major --message 'chore: bump version to %s'
